title: University of Southampton Delhi Regional Forum in Kolkata
text:
Regional forum in Kolkata
Event Status: Completed
Date: March 29, 2025
Location: RP Goenka International School, 34 1/1, Diamond Harbour Rd, Majherhat, Mominpore, Kolkata, West Bengal 700027, India
Recommended for: Potential applicants
Book now
The IC3 Regional Forums are a mission-driven effort to bring counseling to every school. At the heart of the forums lies the belief that every student deserves access to guidance and clarity to build a fulfilling future. RP Goenka International School, 34 1/1, Diamond Harbour Rd, Majherhat, Mominpore, Kolkata, West Bengal 700027, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi hosted a Regional Forum in Kolkata on March 29, 2025, at RP Goenka International School, aimed at providing counseling and guidance to potential applicants.
